title: How Peter Magyar Defeated Viktor Orban, a Former Ally, In Hungary’s Election
summary_full: For years, Peter Magyar was a loyal ally of Viktor Orban, the far-right Hungarian leader. Then he changed sides — and defeated his former boss in a landslide victory on Sunday. Does he represent real change?
summary_public: For years, Peter Magyar was a loyal ally of Viktor Orban, the far-right Hungarian leader. Then he changed sides — and defeated his former boss in a landslide victory on Sunday. Does he represent real change?

HU.label: positive
HU.evidence: Peter Magyar Defeated Viktor Orban... Does he represent real change?
